summary_line: $13.4B AUM national RIA roll-up (formerly Sebold Capital Management before rebrand) — 186 employees, advisor count not parsed (large multi-strategy firm). Tagline: 'Why-Powered wealth management.' Active M&A acquirer of other RIAs (nav has 'M&A for RIAs'). Recognized by Barron's Top RIAs in America, Top 100 RIA firms, Financial Advisor RIA Leaders. 0 DRPs. Several orders of magnitude larger than USWM — useful primarily as 'what a roll-up at scale looks like' benchmark rather than direct competitor.
regulatory_note: Firm rebranded from 'Sebold Capital Management' — the prior shortlist entry pointed at the old name. The Mather Group is the current legal entity. ADV PDF parser returned advisor_count=null (large multi-strategy firm; may need manual extraction from PDF).

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 156005 — 186 employees, advisor count not parsed by ADV PDF parser, $13,446,388,872 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'THE MATHER GROUP, LLC.'

Site capture: 4 pages (home, services, contact, blog). Tagline: 'Why-powered wealth management.' Home highlights media recognition: Top 100 RIA firms · Barron's · Top RIAs in America · Financial Advisor RIA Leaders · Financial Planning. Nav includes 'M&A for RIAs' — actively acquiring other RIAs. Site value props: 'Transparent pricing, fiduciary responsibility, and personalized financial strategies.' Service line nav at /services-wealth. Careers page at /careers-wealth. Brand rebranded from former 'Sebold Capital Management.'

_schema._applicability: Larger firm than USWM's direct competitive class — treat as benchmark, not direct comparable.
